disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden high fever with violent shaking rigors, roughly ten days after the last chemotherapy cycle
trigger_question_examples: When did the fever start and have you had any treatment recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had chemo about ten days ago, and two hours ago I suddenly spiked a high fever with violent shaking chills — my home thermometer read 38.6.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New spontaneous bleeding from the gums and a nosebleed with no obvious cause
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any bleeding anywhere?
Are your gums or nose bleeding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My gums have started oozing blood for no reason and I've had a nosebleed tonight — it just started on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fever did not respond at all to paracetamol taken two hours earlier
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the fever, and did it help?
Did any medicine bring the temperature down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took 1000 mg of paracetamol about two hours ago and it did absolutely nothing — the fever hasn't shifted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness and faintness/lightheadedness on sitting up; drenching sweats
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint or dizzy when you sit or stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm so weak I can't get out of bed, I'm soaked in sweat, and I go really faint and lightheaded whenever I try to sit up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New reddish-purple spots and bruises on both forearms
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any new rash, spots or bruising on your skin?
Any little blood spots on your arms or legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are new little reddish-purple blood spots and bruises on both my forearms that weren't there before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful mouth ulcers making the mouth sore, without any obvious pus or redness around them
trigger_question_examples: Is your mouth sore, or do you have any ulcers?
Any pain when you eat or drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mouth is really sore with some deep ulcers on the inside of my cheeks, but they don't look red or full of pus.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has an indwelling central venous line in place for chemotherapy
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a line or port in for your chemotherapy?
Is there a tube or central line in your chest or arm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've got a central line in for the chemo — it looks clean to me, no redness around it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is bedbound and entirely dependent on spouse; lives about 30 minutes from the nearest tertiary hospital
trigger_question_examples: How far are you from a hospital and can you get there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse is here with me but I can't move on my own, and we're about half an hour from the nearest big hospital.
